name: Tessera v0.13 coverage
description: Tessera v0.13 mitigation coverage mapped to MITRE ATLAS v14. Each technique score of 100 indicates at least one Tessera SecurityEvent kind detects or blocks that technique. Scores are coverage indicators, not severity ratings. Generated from tessera.compliance.MITRE_ATLAS.

techniques.comment: Covered by: policy_deny, worker_schema_violation, content_injection_detected, critic.deny, critic.injection_suspect

metadata.name: mitigation_mechanism
metadata.value: Trust-label taint tracking (min_trust) blocks tool calls when any context segment is untrusted. Schema-enforced dual-LLM quarantine prevents free-form injection from the Worker.

techniques.comment: Covered by: content_injection_detected, label_verify_failure, provenance_verify_failure, critical_args.deny, critic.deny, critic.injection_suspect, claim_provenance.fail

metadata.name: tessera_events
metadata.value: content_injection_detected, label_verify_failure, provenance_verify_failure, critical_args.deny, critic.deny, critic.injection_suspect, claim_provenance.fail

metadata.name: mitigation_mechanism
metadata.value: HMAC/JWT signed context labels detect tampered or forged provenance. Critical-args enforcement blocks tool calls where sensitive arguments derive from untrusted context segments.

techniques.comment: Covered by: guardrail_decision, human_approval_required, human_approval_resolved, critic.approval_required

metadata.name: mitigation_mechanism
metadata.value: LLMGuardrail evaluates context and emits a decision event. Human-approval gates halt irreversible actions. Action Critic requires explicit approval for high-risk operations.

techniques.comment: Covered by: identity_verify_failure, proof_verify_failure, delegation_verify_failure, secret_redacted, label.declassify, mcp.token.audience_mismatch, delegation.exec

metadata.name: tessera_events
metadata.value: identity_verify_failure, proof_verify_failure, delegation_verify_failure, secret_redacted, label.declassify, mcp.token.audience_mismatch, delegation.exec

metadata.name: mitigation_mechanism
metadata.value: SecretRegistry redacts credentials before context enters the LLM. Delegation tokens carry audience constraints (RFC 8707). Identity and proof verification block impersonation attempts.

metadata.name: mitigation_mechanism
metadata.value: MCP manifest signature verification detects tampered server manifests. Shape-drift detection flags behavioural changes between baseline and live tool outputs.
